scope: Animism and sorcery cults detected from current app-facing CULTS_DATA and raw cult source rows

classification.animism: A cult is animism-capable when cultSkills contains a Binding* or Trance* skill.
classification.sorcery: A cult is sorcery-capable when cultSkills contains an Invocation* or Shaping* skill.
classification.appFacing: A cult is app-facing when it is present in index.html CULTS_DATA.
classification.cultureSelectable: A cult is culture-selectable when it is present in an index.html CULTURE_CULT_MAP primary or secondary list.
